title: clinopodium chinense var. parviflorum
intro: Clinopodium chinense var. parviflorum, also known as Sichuan mint or lesser Chinese clinopodium, is a plant species within the mint family that is native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium chinense var. parviflorum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate headaches and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into various medicinal formulas.
